urgent_methodology: Publisher-marked Breaking, Urgent, Alert, Just in, Developing or similar items are collected first and receive priority over standard items, unless they are liveblogs, programme previews or low-value content.

latest.title: Tropical Storm Bertha threatens US Gulf coast
latest.summary: Tropical Storm Bertha was located about 105 miles south of Panama City, Florida, carrying windspeeds of 40mph. The storm is expected to move near or along the northern Gulf coast over the next several days.
latest.details: Tropical Storm Bertha was located about 105 miles south of Panama City, Florida, carrying windspeeds of 40mph. The storm is expected to move near or along the northern Gulf coast over the next several days. Forecasters predict that some areas could receive up to 8 inches of rain by Friday, with isolated tornados possible in Florida. A tropical storm watch is currently in effect for specific regions in Florida and Louisiana.
latest.full_brief: Tropical Storm Bertha was located about 105 miles south of Panama City, Florida, carrying windspeeds of 40mph. The storm is expected to move near or along the northern Gulf coast over the next several days. Forecasters predict that some areas could receive up to 8 inches of rain by Friday, with isolated tornados possible in Florida. A tropical storm watch is currently in effect for specific regions in Florida and Louisiana.

latest.title: US launches fresh strikes on Iran, as Trump warns of retaliation for deaths of soldiers
latest.summary: The strikes are part of the 10th consecutive night of attacks by the US on Iran. US President Donald Trump stated that Iran had been hit 'very hard' in response to the deaths of three US soldiers.
latest.details: The strikes are part of the 10th consecutive night of attacks by the US on Iran. US President Donald Trump stated that Iran had been hit 'very hard' in response to the deaths of three US soldiers. Iran reported that it struck two oil tankers and US military assets in Bahrain and Kuwait. The US Central Command confirmed that the strikes targeted Iranian military command centers and missile launch sites.
latest.full_brief: The strikes are part of the 10th consecutive night of attacks by the US on Iran. US President Donald Trump stated that Iran had been hit 'very hard' in response to the deaths of three US soldiers. Iran reported that it struck two oil tankers and US military assets in Bahrain and Kuwait. The US Central Command confirmed that the strikes targeted Iranian military command centers and missile launch sites.

latest.title: Bumblebees are struggling in UK heatwaves - but you can help them
latest.summary: The Bumblebee Conservation Trust's monitoring scheme indicates a decline in bumblebee populations following the heat of 2022. UK bumblebees struggle to fly when temperatures reach between 28C and 32C.
latest.details: The Bumblebee Conservation Trust's monitoring scheme indicates a decline in bumblebee populations following the heat of 2022. UK bumblebees struggle to fly when temperatures reach between 28C and 32C. The data shows that in 2022, common bumblebee species experienced significant population drops, with red-tailed bumblebees down by 20%. Additionally, the effects of the heatwaves extended into 2023, with queen numbers below average in early spring.
latest.full_brief: The Bumblebee Conservation Trust's monitoring scheme indicates a decline in bumblebee populations following the heat of 2022. UK bumblebees struggle to fly when temperatures reach between 28C and 32C. The data shows that in 2022, common bumblebee species experienced significant population drops, with red-tailed bumblebees down by 20%. Additionally, the effects of the heatwaves extended into 2023, with queen numbers below average in early spring.

latest.title: Notorious drug cartel leader Ismael Zambada sentenced to life in US prison
latest.summary: Ismael "El Mayo" Zambada has been sentenced to life in prison by a US judge. He was also ordered to pay $15 billion in restitution for his role in drug trafficking.
latest.details: Ismael "El Mayo" Zambada has been sentenced to life in prison by a US judge. He was also ordered to pay $15 billion in restitution for his role in drug trafficking. Zambada was arrested in Texas after being lured there in a sting operation.
latest.full_brief: Ismael "El Mayo" Zambada has been sentenced to life in prison by a US judge. He was also ordered to pay $15 billion in restitution for his role in drug trafficking. Zambada was arrested in Texas after being lured there in a sting operation.

latest.title: Climate and rock art advocates take on Woodside’s ‘carbon bomb’ WA gas project in federal court
latest.summary: The Australian Conservation Foundation is challenging the Albanese government's approval of a major gas project in federal court. The project, described as a 'carbon bomb,' is expected to release about 4 billion tonnes of CO2 into the atmosphere.
latest.details: The Australian Conservation Foundation is challenging the Albanese government's approval of a major gas project in federal court. The project, described as a 'carbon bomb,' is expected to release about 4 billion tonnes of CO2 into the atmosphere. The gas plant operates near an indigenous rock art complex that contains ancient petroglyphs. A UN special rapporteur has been allowed to intervene in the case to address Australia's international climate obligations.
latest.full_brief: The Australian Conservation Foundation is challenging the Albanese government's approval of a major gas project in federal court. The project, described as a 'carbon bomb,' is expected to release about 4 billion tonnes of CO2 into the atmosphere. The gas plant operates near an indigenous rock art complex that contains ancient petroglyphs. A UN special rapporteur has been allowed to intervene in the case to address Australia's international climate obligations.

latest.title: Donald Trump to impose 50% tariff on most Canadian goods, White House says
latest.summary: Donald Trump announced a 50% tariff on most Canadian goods due to perceived unfair discrimination against US products. The tariffs will affect a wide range of items, including wine and hockey sticks, but will exclude energy products and critical minerals.
latest.details: Donald Trump announced a 50% tariff on most Canadian goods due to perceived unfair discrimination against US products. The tariffs will affect a wide range of items, including wine and hockey sticks, but will exclude energy products and critical minerals. Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney stated that his government has made proposals to resolve trade disputes with the US. The tariffs are set to take effect in 30 days, allowing time for potential negotiations.
latest.full_brief: Donald Trump announced a 50% tariff on most Canadian goods due to perceived unfair discrimination against US products. The tariffs will affect a wide range of items, including wine and hockey sticks, but will exclude energy products and critical minerals. Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney stated that his government has made proposals to resolve trade disputes with the US. The tariffs are set to take effect in 30 days, allowing time for potential negotiations.

latest.title: Craft and keyboard: The trainees mastering tech and age-old skills
latest.summary: Ollie Priestley is pursuing a unique apprenticeship in heritage vehicle technology at Tolman, focusing on restoring modern classic cars. His training incorporates both traditional skills and modern technologies like CAD and 3D printing.
latest.details: Ollie Priestley is pursuing a unique apprenticeship in heritage vehicle technology at Tolman, focusing on restoring modern classic cars. His training incorporates both traditional skills and modern technologies like CAD and 3D printing. The Heritage Skills Academy has revamped its apprenticeship program to include these digital skills alongside essential trade techniques. This shift reflects a broader trend in vocational training, where higher-level apprenticeships are becoming more common.
latest.full_brief: Ollie Priestley is pursuing a unique apprenticeship in heritage vehicle technology at Tolman, focusing on restoring modern classic cars. His training incorporates both traditional skills and modern technologies like CAD and 3D printing. The Heritage Skills Academy has revamped its apprenticeship program to include these digital skills alongside essential trade techniques. This shift reflects a broader trend in vocational training, where higher-level apprenticeships are becoming more common.

latest.title: 'I made £100,000 of TikTok sales in one day': The business of live shopping
latest.summary: Daisy Kelly founded her business, Glow For It, in 2020 while she was a student, and it now generates £6 million annually. A significant portion of her sales, over 40%, comes from TikTok Shop UK, particularly through livestreams.
latest.details: Daisy Kelly founded her business, Glow For It, in 2020 while she was a student, and it now generates £6 million annually. A significant portion of her sales, over 40%, comes from TikTok Shop UK, particularly through livestreams. Daisy has reported generating over £100,000 in revenue during a single 12-hour TikTok live session. The popularity of live shopping is growing rapidly, with 30% of surveyed shoppers having made purchases during such events.
latest.full_brief: Daisy Kelly founded her business, Glow For It, in 2020 while she was a student, and it now generates £6 million annually. A significant portion of her sales, over 40%, comes from TikTok Shop UK, particularly through livestreams. Daisy has reported generating over £100,000 in revenue during a single 12-hour TikTok live session. The popularity of live shopping is growing rapidly, with 30% of surveyed shoppers having made purchases during such events.

latest.title: ‘Front groups and fellow travelers’: state department attacks US left over Cuba
latest.summary: The US state department has released a report labeling several left-leaning activists and organizations as 'front groups and fellow travelers' for Cuba. The report accuses the Cuban government of a campaign of subversion that has infiltrated the US government and influenced American activists.
latest.details: The US state department has released a report labeling several left-leaning activists and organizations as 'front groups and fellow travelers' for Cuba. The report accuses the Cuban government of a campaign of subversion that has infiltrated the US government and influenced American activists. It specifically mentions individuals like Hasan Piker and Chris Smalls, as well as organizations like the Democratic Socialists of America. The report follows the Trump administration's ongoing criticism of leftist groups and policies regarding Cuba.
latest.full_brief: The US state department has released a report labeling several left-leaning activists and organizations as 'front groups and fellow travelers' for Cuba. The report accuses the Cuban government of a campaign of subversion that has infiltrated the US government and influenced American activists. It specifically mentions individuals like Hasan Piker and Chris Smalls, as well as organizations like the Democratic Socialists of America. The report follows the Trump administration's ongoing criticism of leftist groups and policies regarding Cuba.

brief_methodology.pl: Komentarz powstaje wyłącznie z przeczytanego tekstu artykułu. Musi przejść niezależny przegląd AI oraz pełną kontrolę językową; surowy tekst artykułu lub RSS nie może być komentarzem awaryjnym.
brief_methodology.en: A comment is created only from the retrieved article text. It must pass an independent AI review and the complete language gate; raw article or RSS text is never a fallback comment.

comment_quality_gate.pl: Publikowany jest wyłącznie komentarz utworzony z tekstu artykułu, zatwierdzony w niezależnym przeglądzie AI i przyjęty w całości przez rygorystyczną kontrolę językową. Jedno wadliwe zdanie odrzuca cały komentarz.
comment_quality_gate.en: Only an article-derived comment approved by an independent AI review and accepted in full by the strict language gate is published. One defective sentence rejects the whole comment.

same_story_dedupe.rule: One underlying event gets one homepage card, even if multiple publishers cover it with different links.
